Operation 'getPresentation' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary 'Poll a specific presentation' is vague about what data is retrieved. Description lacks clarity about the presentationId parameter requirement and what the response contains. Improved version specifies the parameter requirement, clarifies the response structure (presentation object with status and URL), and provides context about when to use this operation in relation to createPresentation for better AI agent workflow understanding.

data.current_description: Check generation status and retrieve the downloadable file when the presentation is complete.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve presentation status and download link
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current generation status and details for a specific presentation identified by presentationId. Returns the presentation object with status information and a downloadable file URL when generation is complete. Use this operation to poll for completion after creating a presentation.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Poll a specific presentation' is vague about what data is retrieved. Improved version specifies the parameter requirement, clarifies the response structure (presentation object with status and URL), and provides context about when to use this operation in relation to createPresentation for better AI agent workflow understanding.

message: Operation 'listPresentations' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear and actionable. Description mentions the 100-presentation limit but lacks clarity about the response format (array of Presentation objects) and practical use cases. Improved version specifies the response structure, clarifies the ordering (most recent), and provides context about how this operation fits into typical workflows (retrieving IDs for subsequent operations).

data.current_description: Retrieve all generated presentations you have created via the Presentations API. Returns the last 100 presentations only.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all presentations you have created via the Presentations API. Returns an array of presentation objects (maximum 100 most recent presentations). Use this operation to view your presentation history and retrieve presentation IDs for polling or downloading.
